red_run.failed_test: SessionManager retries asynchronous process start identity capture after a transient failure
red_run.note: Only the new regression test failed at RED; the two soon-to-be-updated existing tests (testReadProcessStartIdentityWindowsTimeoutReturnsNull, testSessionManagerIgnoresRejectedAsyncStartIdentityCapture) still passed because source was unchanged, confirming the new test isolates the missing-retry defect.

root_cause_confirmed: With the pre-fix scheduleProcessStartIdentityCapture (single probe, no retry), a transient null/timeout leaves captureCalls at 1 and osStartIdentity null forever; the test asserts >=2 probe attempts and a recovered identity, so it fails on the first probe count assertion.
